source: Recursive Engine — converted from v7.0.0 system specification
description: Skill manifest for the AIWF v7.0.0 ultra-antifragile command system. Captured by Recursive Engine for persistent skill memory. Enables any session to reconstruct full orchestration capability from this manifest alone.

commands_mastered.key_pattern: idea → clarify(≤3 questions) → REQ-IDs → prd.md + trace.json
gotchas: Never ask more than 3 clarifying questions

commands_mastered.key_pattern: prd.md → spec.yaml + design.md + contracts/ + validation/ → all 4 gates
EXPLICIT ONLY → vercel CLI → link → env pull → deploy → log
gotchas: NEVER auto-triggered by git push or merge

commands_mastered.key_pattern: failure → map to AC → Healing Bot v2 patch → log to healing-bot.md
gotchas: Use /fix last for most recent failure

commands_mastered.key_pattern: proactive(15-20%) or explicit → structured proposal + copyable spec block

friction_lessons.detail: Git automation and Vercel deployment must never be coupled. /deploy is always explicit.
friction_lessons.anti_pattern: Auto-triggering /deploy on git push or auto-merge

friction_lessons.lesson: spec.yaml is the single source of truth
friction_lessons.detail: All implementation decisions trace back to spec.yaml. If not in spec, it should not be built.
friction_lessons.anti_pattern: Building features not represented by REQ-IDs

friction_lessons.detail: Always check factory/library/ before generating new components. Most patterns already exist.
friction_lessons.anti_pattern: Generating fresh components without checking the library
